title: adhatoda minor
intro: Adhatoda minor, also known as Adhatoda vasica, is a small shrub-like plant belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are rich in alkaloids such as vasicine and vasicinone. The leaves of the Adhatoda minor plant have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and expectorant properties, which make it beneficial for treating respiratory issues like bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or capsule, and its health benefits include alleviating respiratory problems, reducing inflammation, and even lowering blood pressure.
